message:
Remove dead MarkIssueDirty from compact test stubs

The compactableStore interface no longer includes MarkIssueDirty (removed
when dirty tracking was eliminated), but test stubs still had it and
tests were asserting it was called. Remove the dead stub method, field,
and two tests that verified error propagation from a removed code path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
